name: Orange-Butterscotch Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine oats, margarine, brown sugar, and flour. Press into bottom of 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 350 degrees F for 15 minutes.
2. In a large bowl, combine cream cheese, granulated sugar, orange peel, and vanilla. Mix on medium speed until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Pour mixture over crust.
3. Bake at 325 degrees F for 1 hour and 5 minutes. Loosen cake from rim of pan and chill.
4. In a saucepan, combine brown sugar, corn syrup, and margarine. Bring to boil, stirring constantly. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla. Chill until slightly thickened.
5. Spoon over cheesecake. Garnish with orange slice and fresh mint, if desired.
